incidents.title: Auth service high error rate
incidents.root_cause: Redis cache memory exhaustion causing cache miss storm
causal_chain: Redis memory usage reached 100%
New cache entries evicted immediately
Cache hit rate dropped from 95% to 20%
Auth service hit database for every request
Database connection pool exhausted
Auth service timeouts and errors

resolution.immediate_action: Increased Redis memory limit from 4GB to 8GB
resolution.mitigation: Restarted auth-service pods to reset connection pool
resolution.preventive_measure: Added Redis memory usage alerts at 80% threshold

incidents.business_impact: 15% of login attempts failed, $5K revenue impact

incidents.title: Order service degradation during flash sale
incidents.root_cause: Database lock contention from inefficient query
symptoms: order-service completion time increased from 200ms to 5s
causal_chain: Flash sale triggered 10x normal order volume
Inventory check query used table-level lock
Multiple concurrent orders blocked on same lock
Lock wait queue grew to 200+ transactions
Transactions timed out waiting for lock
Order failures cascaded

resolution.preventive_measure: Refactored query to use row-level locks only

incidents.business_impact: 8% order failure rate during 30min window, $50K revenue impact

incidents.title: Payment service webhook timeouts
incidents.root_cause: Stripe webhook retry storm amplified by slow fraud detection
causal_chain: Fraud detection API latency increased to 10s (normal: 200ms)
Webhook processing exceeded 5s Stripe timeout
Stripe retried failed webhooks exponentially
Retry storm amplified load by 5x
Payment service overwhelmed
More webhooks timed out, creating feedback loop

resolution.immediate_action: Temporarily disabled fraud detection in webhook handler
resolution.preventive_measure: Moved fraud detection to async background job

incidents.business_impact: Payment confirmation delays, customer support spike

incidents.title: API gateway cascading failure
incidents.root_cause: Order-service connection leak caused by unclosed database connections
causal_chain: Deployed order-service with connection leak bug
Database connections not closed in error path
Connection pool slowly exhausted over 2 hours
Order-service stopped responding to health checks
API gateway marked order-service unhealthy
All orders routed to remaining instances
Remaining instances also exhausted connections
Complete order-service outage

resolution.preventive_measure: Added connection pool monitoring and alerts

incidents.business_impact: Complete order outage for 15 minutes, $80K revenue impact

incidents.title: Inventory service data staleness
incidents.root_cause: Warehouse API rate limiting triggered by sync job misconfiguration
causal_chain: Deployed new inventory sync job with 10x poll frequency
Warehouse API rate limit hit (1000 req/hour)
API returned 429 errors
Sync job entered backoff retry loop
Inventory data became stale
Orders placed for out-of-stock items
Fulfillment failures discovered after payment

resolution.immediate_action: Reverted sync job to original poll frequency
resolution.preventive_measure: Added rate limit monitoring and exponential backoff

resource_exhaustion.resolution_pattern: Scale resource → restart service → fix leak

cascading_failure.resolution_pattern: Identify origin → isolate failing component → rollback or scale

external_dependency_failure.resolution_pattern: Implement fallback → add circuit breaker → improve retry logic

database_contention.resolution_pattern: Kill blocking query → optimize query → add indexes
